workflow.name: OrchestKit PR Test Runner
workflow.description: Run full test suite on OrchestKit PRs touching hooks or skills. Reports pass/fail with details.

steps.instruction:
Run the full OrchestKit test suite:
1. cd src/hooks && npm install && npm run build
2. cd ../.. && npm run build
3. npm test
4. npm run typecheck
5. npm run test:security

Capture all output. Note any failures with full error messages and stack traces.

Read the test results from {{outputs.run-tests.message}}.

Post a PR comment with this format:

## Test Results — OrchestKit CI

| Suite | Status | Details |
|-------|--------|--------|
| Build (hooks) | ✅/❌ | ... |
| Build (plugins) | ✅/❌ | ... |
| Unit tests | ✅/❌ | X passed, X failed |
| Security tests | ✅/❌ | ... |
| TypeScript types | ✅/❌ | ... |

### Failures (if any)
```
test name: error message
```

**Verdict: [ALL PASS / X FAILURES — BLOCK MERGE]**
